sections.paragraph:
Original: לבשׁ לבשׁ

Transliteration: lâbash lâbêsh

Phonetic: law-bash'

BDB Definition:

  1. to dress, wear, clothe, put on clothing, be clothed
    1. (Qal)
      1. to put on clothes, be clothed, wear
      2. to put on, be clothed with (figuratively)
    2. (Pual) to be fully clothed
    3. (Hiphil) to clothe, array with, dress

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1075

Part(s) of speech: Verb
